{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1774342371,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d1f09ab6e7cd8a155145d8dcb3a06","conversation_id":"019d0a4ecfdb7314a102b2730c6ac6d6","tool_call_id":"call_92273207-5d15-4ea8-97f4-341980c41a24","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019d1f09ab6e7cd8a155145d8dcb3a06","toolCallId":"call_92273207-5d15-4ea8-97f4-341980c41a24","content":"{\"content\": \"diff --git a/SKILL.md b/SKILL.md\\nindex 95a5056..0f2f660 100644\\n--- a/SKILL.md\\n+++ b/SKILL.md\\n@@ -3,97 +3,283 @@ name: git-api-gateway-doc\\n description: Scan git diff for new or modified API interfaces and generate gateway documentation in standardized format. Use when user requests API documentation generation from git changes, asks to document new endpoints, or needs gateway docs for recent interface modifications. Triggers on phrases like \\\"generate gateway docs from git diff\\\", \\\"document new APIs\\\", \\\"scan git for interface changes\\\", \\\"API gateway documentation\\\" etc.\\n ---\\n \\n-# Git Api Gateway Doc\\n+# Git API Gateway Doc\\n \\n ## Overview\\n \\n-Automatically scan git diff output to identify new or modified API endpoints and generate standardized gateway documentation. Processes controller files, extracts interface definitions, and outputs documentation in consistent format.\\n+从 Django / DRF 项目的 `git diff` 文件中自动识别新增和变更的 API 接口，分两步生成完整文档：\\n+\\n+1. **`parse_git_diff.py`** — 解析 diff → 输出结构化 JSON\\n+2. **`generate_md.py`** — 读取 JSON → 渲染为可自定义格式的 Markdown（每个接口单独一个文件或合并为一个文件）\\n+\\n+---\\n \\n ## Workflow\\n \\n-### Step 1: Get Git Diff\\n-Collect git diff output for the target branch/commit range:\\n-- `git diff HEAD~1` (last commit)\\n-- `git diff main..feature-branch` (branch comparison)\\n-- `git diff --cached` (staged changes)\\n+### Step 1：获取 git diff\\n+\\n+```bash\\n+# 最近一次提交\\n+git diff HEAD~1 > changes.diff\\n+\\n+# 分支对比\\n+git diff main..feature-branch > changes.diff\\n+\\n+# 暂存区\\n+git diff --cached > changes.diff\\n+```\\n+\\n+### Step 2：解析 diff → JSON\\n+\\n+```bash\\n+python3 scripts/parse_git_diff.py \\\\\\n+ --diff-file changes.diff \\\\\\n+ --output api_doc.json\\n+```\\n+\\n+输出示例：\\n+```json\\n+{\\n+ \\\"meta\\\": {\\n+ \\\"generated_at\\\": \\\"2026-03-24 16:00:00\\\",\\n+ \\\"source_diff\\\": \\\"changes.diff\\\",\\n+ \\\"framework\\\": \\\"Django/DRF\\\",\\n+ \\\"total_changes\\\": 10,\\n+ \\\"new_apis\\\": 7,\\n+ \\\"modified_apis\\\": 3\\n+ },\\n+ \\\"apis\\\": [\\n+ {\\n+ \\\"method\\\": \\\"POST\\\",\\n+ \\\"path\\\": \\\"/inventory/transfer-stock\\\",\\n+ \\\"description\\\": \\\"Stock transfer between warehouses\\\",\\n+ \\\"change_type\\\": \\\"新增\\\",\\n+ \\\"route_name\\\": \\\"transfer_stock\\\",\\n+ \\\"source_file\\\": \\\"inventory/views.py\\\",\\n+ \\\"auth_required\\\": true,\\n+ \\\"request\\\": {\\n+ \\\"path_params\\\": [],\\n+ \\\"query_params\\\": [],\\n+ \\\"body_params\\\": [\\n+ { \\\"name\\\": \\\"from_warehouse_id\\\", \\\"type\\\": \\\"string\\\", \\\"required\\\": true, \\\"description\\\": \\\"\\\" }\\n+ ]\\n+ },\\n+ \\\"response\\\": {\\n+ \\\"success\\\": { \\\"status_code\\\": 201, \\\"fields\\\": [] },\\n+ \\\"error_codes\\\": [\\n+ { \\\"code\\\": 400, \\\"description\\\": \\\"请求参数错误\\\" }\\n+ ]\\n+ }\\n+ }\\n+ ]\\n+}\\n+```\\n+\\n+### Step 3：渲染 JSON → Markdown\\n+\\n+```bash\\n+# 每个 API 单独一个文件（推荐）\\n+python3 scripts/generate_md.py \\\\\\n+ --input api_doc.json \\\\\\n+ --split \\\\\\n+ --output-dir api_docs/\\n+\\n+# 所有 API 合并为一个文件\\n+python3 scripts/generate_md.py \\\\\\n+ --input api_doc.json \\\\\\n+ --output api_doc.md\\n \\n... extra lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"64.16 KB\", \"isBigFile\": true, \"totalLines\": 1792}"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d1f09ab6e7cd8a155145d8dcb3a06","conversation_id":"019d0a4ecfdb7314a102b2730c6ac6d6","tool_call_id":"call_28ebae3b-0105-4980-a356-a2c619ee4e26","document":{"file_path":"/data/workspace/git-api-gateway-doc/example_api_changes.diff","sub_content":"example_api_changes.diff","sub_content_event":"open_editor","sub_content_event_value":"/data/workspace/git-api-gateway-doc/example_api_changes.diff","sub_content_tip":"/data/workspace/git-api-gateway-doc/example_api_changes.diff","apply_content":"diff --git a/users/views.py b/users/views.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..e69de29
--- /dev/null
+++ b/users/views.py
@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+from rest_framework.decorators import api_view
+from rest_framework.response import Response
+from rest_framework import status
+
+# NEW: User management API endpoints
+
+@api_view(['GET', 'POST'])
+def user_list(request):
+ """
+ List all users or create a new user
+ """
+ if request.method == 'GET':
+ # Get query parameters
+ page = request.query_params.get('page', 1)
+ size = request.query_params.get('size', 20)
+ 
+ return Response({
+ 'users': [],
+ 'total': 0,
+ 'page': page,
+ 'size': size
+ })
+ 
+ elif request.method == 'POST':
+ # Create new user
+ username = request.data.get('username')
+ email = request.data.get('email')
+ password = request.data.get('password')
+ 
+ return Response({
+ 'id': 1,
+ 'username': username,
+ 'email': email
+ }, status=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
+
+@api_view(['GET', 'PUT', 'DELETE'])
+def user_detail(request, user_id):
+ """
+ Retrieve, update or delete a user instance
+ """
+ if request.method == 'GET':
+ return Response({'id': user_id, 'name': 'John Doe'})
+ 
+ elif request.method == 'PUT':
+ username = request.data.get('username')
+ email = request.data.get('email')
+ return Response({'id': user_id, 'username': username, 'email': email})
+ 
+ elif request.method == 'DELETE':
+ return Response(status=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
+
+@api_view(['POST'])
+def user_login(request):
+ """
+ User authentication endpoint
+ """
+ username = request.data.get('username')
+ password = request.data.get('password')
+ 
+ return Response({
+ 'token': 'jwt_token_here',
+ 'user_id': 1,
+ 'username': username
+ })
+
diff --git a/users/urls.py b/users/urls.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..e69de29
--- /dev/null
+++ b/users/urls.py
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+from django.urls import path
+from . import views
+
+urlpatterns = [
+ # NEW: User management endpoints
+ path('users/', views.user_list, name='user-list'),
+ path('users/<int:user_id>/', views.user_detail, name='user-detail'),
+ path('auth/login/', views.user_login, name='user-login'),
+ path('auth/logout/', views.user_logout, name='user-logout'),
+]","instruction":"创建一个示例的Django API变更diff文件，包含用户管理相关的API接口","apply_mode":"apply_only"}},"timestamp":1774342384,"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS"}

entry.value:
--- name: git-api-gateway-doc description: Scan git diff for new or modified API interfaces and generate gateway documentation in standardized format. Use when user requests API documentation generation from git changes, asks to document new endpoints, or needs gateway docs for recent interface modifications. Triggers on phrases like "generate gateway docs from git diff", "document new APIs", "scan git for interface changes", "API gateway documentation" etc. ---
# Git API Gateway Doc
## Overview
从 Django / DRF 项目的 `git diff` 文件中自动识别新增和变更的 API 接口，分两步生成完整文档：
1. **`parse_git_diff.py`** — 解析 diff → 输出结构化 JSON 2. **`generate_md.py`** — 读取 JSON → 渲染为可自定义格式的 Markdown（每个接口单独一个文件或合并为一个文件）
---
## Workflow
### Step 1：获取 git diff
```bash # 最近一次提交 git diff HEAD~1 > changes.diff
# 分支对比 git diff main..feature-branch > changes.diff
# 暂存区 git diff --cached > changes.diff ```
### Step 2：解析 diff → JSON
```bash python3 scripts/parse_git_diff.py \ --diff-file changes.diff \ --output api_doc.json ```
输出示例： ```json { "meta": { "generated_at": "2026-03-24 16:00:00", "source_diff": "changes.diff", "framework": "Django/DRF", "total_changes": 10, "new_apis": 7, "modified_apis": 3 }, "apis": [ { "method": "POST", "path": "/inventory/transfer-stock", "description": "Stock transfer between warehouses", "change_type": "新增", "route_name": "transfer_stock", "source_file": "inventory/views.py", "auth_required": true, "request": { "path_params": [], "query_params": [], "body_params": [ { "name": "from_warehouse_id", "type": "string", "required": true, "description": "" } ] }, "response": { "success": { "status_code": 201, "fields": [] }, "error_codes": [ { "code": 400, "description": "请求参数错误" } ] } } ] } ```
### Step 3：渲染 JSON → Markdown
```bash # 每个 API 单独一个文件（推荐） python3 scripts/generate_md.py \ --input api_doc.json \ --split \ --output-dir api_docs/
# 所有 API 合并为一个文件 python3 scripts/generate_md.py \ --input api_doc.json \ --output api_doc.md
# 只输出新增接口 python3 scripts/generate_md.py \ --input api_doc.json \ --split \ --output-dir api_docs/ \ --filter 新增 ```
---
## 脚本说明
### parse_git_diff.py
**功能**：解析 Django/DRF `git diff`，提取 API 变更信息，输出 JSON。
**支持识别**：
| 场景 | 识别方式 | | ------------ | ------------ | | `@api_view(['GET', 'POST'])` | 提取装饰器中的 HTTP 方法列表 | | `@action(detail=True, methods=['post'])` | 提取 ViewSet action 方法 | | 类视图方法（`def get/post/put...`） | 按方法名映射 HTTP 方法 | | `path('url/', view_func, name='...')` | 从 urls.py 提取路径和路由名 | | `re_path / url()` | 同上 | | `<int:pk>` / `<str:slug>` | 转换为 `{pk}` / `{slug}` | | `request.data.get('key')` | 识别为 body 参数 | | `request.GET.get('key')` | 识别为 query 参数 | | `request.query_params.get('key')` | 识别为 query 参数 | | `Response({...})` | 提取响应字段名和类型 | | `Response(serializer.data)` | 标记为 object 类型响应 | | `# NEW: ...` / `# CHANGED: ...` 注释 | 提取接口描述 | | docstring `"""..."""` | 提取接口描述 |
**参数**：
| 参数 | 简写 | 说明 | | ------------ | ------------ | ------------ | | `--diff-file` | `-d` | git diff 文件路径（必填） | | `--output` | `-o` | 输出 JSON 文件路径（不填则打印到控制台） |
---
### generate_md.py
**功能**：将 JSON 接口文档渲染为 Markdown，支持自定义模板、拆分文件、按变更类型过滤。
**参数**：
| 参数 | 简写 | 说明 | | ------------ | ------------ | ------------ | | `--input` | `-i` | 输入 JSON 文件路径（必填） | | `--output` | `-o` | 合并模式输出 .md 文件路径 | | `--split` | `-s` | 拆分模式：每个 API 单独一个 .md 文件 | | `--output-dir` | `-od` | 拆分模式的输出目录（默认 `api_docs/`） | | `--preset` | `-p` | 内置模板：`default` / `minimal` / `compact` | | `--api-template` | `-t` | 自定义 API 模板字符串（命令行传入） | | `--api-template-file` | `-tf` | 从文件读取自定义 API 模板 | | `--doc-template-file` | `-df` | 从文件读取自定义文档级模板 | | `--filter` | `-f` | 只输出指定变更类型：`新增` 或 `变更` | | `--show-presets` | — | 打印所有内置模板内容后退出 |
---
## 模板变量
### API 级别变量（用于 `--api-template`）
| 变量 | 内容 | | ------------ | ------------ | | `$method` | HTTP 方法（GET / POST / PUT / PATCH / DELETE） | | `$path` | 接口路径（如 `/api/users/{pk}`） | | `$description` | 接口描述 | | `$change_type` | 变更类型（新增 / 变更） | | `$route_name` | 路由名称 | | `$source_file` | 来源文件路径 | | `$auth_required` | 认证要求（需要 / 不需要） | | `$request_params` | 请求参数表格（自动渲染） | | `$response_params` | 响应参数表格（自动渲染） | | `$request_example` | 请求示例 JSON 代码块（自动渲染） | | `$response_example` | 响应示例 JSON 代码块，固定 `code/message/data` 结构 | | `$error_codes` | 错误码表格（自动渲染） |
### 文档级别变量（用于 `--doc-template-file`）
| 变量 | 内容 | | ------------ | ------------ | | `$generated_at` | 生成时间 | | `$source_diff` | 源 diff 文件名 | | `$total_changes` | 总接口数 | | `$new_apis` | 新增接口数 | | `$modified_apis` | 变更接口数 | | `$api_list` | 所有 API 块拼接内容 |
---
## 输出格式示例
### 请求 / 响应参数表格
``` | 参数名称 | 参数类型 | 必选 | 描述 | | ------------ | ------------ | ------------ | ------------ | | account_id | integer | 是 | 用户ID | | page | integer | 否 | 页码 | ```
### 响应示例（固定结构）
```json { "code": 0, "message": "success", "data": { "id": 1, "name": "示例名称" } } ```
---
## 自定义模板示例
**自定义模板文件 `my_template.md`**：
``` ### $method $path
**描述：** $description **变更类型：** $change_type
**请求参数**
$request_params
**请求示例**
$request_example
**响应示例**
$response_example
--- ```
使用方式：
```bash python3 scripts/generate_md.py \ --input api_doc.json \ --split \ --output-dir api_docs/ \ --api-template-file my_template.md ```
---
## 完整端到端示例
```bash # Step 1: 获取 diff git diff HEAD~1 > changes.diff
# Step 2: 解析为 JSON python3 scripts/parse_git_diff.py -d changes.diff -o api_doc.json
# Step 3: 生成 MD（每个接口单独一个文件，只输出新增） python3 scripts/generate_md.py \ -i api_doc.json \ --split \ --output-dir api_docs/ \ --filter 新增 \ --preset default ```
生成文件命名规则：`{METHOD}_{路径下划线连接}.md` 例如：`POST /inventory/transfer-stock` → `POST_inventory_transfer-stock.md`
---
## 注意事项
- 仅解析 `urls.py` 和 `views.py` 中的变更行（`+` 开头） - `serializers.py` / `models.py` 的变更用于辅助类型推断，不单独生成接口条目 - URL 前缀自动从文件路径的 app 目录名推断（如 `inventory_management/views.py` → `/inventory_management`） - `auth_required` 默认为 `true`，如需关闭可在生成的 JSON 中手动修改后重新渲染 - 响应示例统一包裹 `{ "code": 0, "message": "success", "data": {...} }` 外层结构
## scripts/
- `parse_git_diff.py`：解析 Django/DRF git diff，输出结构化 API JSON - `generate_md.py`：读取 API JSON，渲染为自定义格式 Markdown 文档

option.name: question
option.value: 从trg wruu生成网关文档
